{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/21539","id":1242140641,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP85KCY_h","number":21539,"title":"BUG: assert_array_equal raises on NaN-s/NaT-s in records","user":{"login":"vmarkovtsev","id":2793551,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI3OTM1NTE=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2793551?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev","html_url":"https://github.com/vmarkovtsev","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/vmarkovtsev/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359214,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5MjE0","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/00%20-%20Bug","name":"00 - Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":2,"created_at":"2022-05-19T18:13:06Z","updated_at":"2024-09-18T06:29:03Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

assert_array_equal promises to correctly compare nan-s, but if there is a nan in a struct, it raises.

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
import numpy as np
from numpy.testing import assert_array_equal

arr = np.array([(1, np.timedelta64("NaT", "s"))], dtype=[("a", int), ("b", "timedelta64[s]")])
# same result: arr = np.array([(1, np.nan)], dtype=[("a", int), ("b", float)])
assert_array_equal(arr, arr)
```


### Error message:

```shell
AssertionError: 
Arrays are not equal

Mismatched elements: 1 / 1 (100%)
 x: array([(1, 'NaT')], dtype=[('a', '<i8'), ('b', '<m8[s]')])
 y: array([(1, 'NaT')], dtype=[('a', '<i8'), ('b', '<m8[s]')])
```


### NumPy/Python version information:

1.21.4","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2357611029","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/21539#issuecomment-2357611029","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/21539","id":2357611029,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA3dP86MhkoV","user":{"login":"Thijss","id":13253091,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjEzMjUzMDkx","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/13253091?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss","html_url":"https://github.com/Thijss","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Thijss/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-09-18T06:29:02Z","updated_at":"2024-09-18T06:29:02Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"As a workaround I'm doing this, but that is of course less efficient.

```python
def struct_array_equal(array1, array2):
    for column in array1.dtype.names:
        if not np.array_equal(array1[column], array2[column], equal_nan=True):
            return False
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2357611029/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
